full_text:
Pei Mao (Juguang) 裴茂 (巨光)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pei Mao (裴茂), styledJuguang (巨光), was born in Wenxi county, Hedong commandery. Sent by Xian to give Cao Cao the Golden Seal. Took part in Li Jue’s death. Pei Mao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Pei Mao lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
